vibe: Premium command center, grounded, trustworthy, modern, confident

layout.surface_style: Flat Solid Surfaces with crisp edges

components.cards: Flat white background, 1px solid border (#E5E2DC), no heavy shadows, subtle hover lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-lg.
components.buttons: Primary: Solid #184A31 background, text-white, rounded-full, px-6 py-2.5, font-medium, hover:bg-[#113523].
components.universal_inbox: A prominent floating command bar or fixed top-header input. Highly visible, allowing users to drop text, links, or files effortlessly.
components.family_switcher: A pill-shaped toggle or dropdown in the header displaying current active member's avatar and name.
components.charts: Use Recharts. Avoid default grid lines (make them very subtle #E5E2DC). Use primary (#184A31) and secondary (#C25942) colors for lines/bars.

icons.guidelines: Use stroke-width 1.5 for a sophisticated, lightweight appearance.

abstract_background.description: Warm sand texture to be used subtly in the background of login or zero-state screens

testing.requirements: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute formatted as kebab-case and role-based (e.g., data-testid='family-switcher-dropdown').

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement a responsive dashboard using React and Tailwind CSS.
Do not use Inter or Roboto fonts. Apply Outfit for headings and Manrope for body text.
No purple, teal, or violet gradients. Stick strictly to the Organic & Earthy palette provided.
Currency must be formatted as INR (₹).
Build the Universal Inbox as the primary entry point for effortless data logging.
Create a modular architecture where 'Finance Dashboard', 'Health Dashboard', and future modules (like Fitness/Travel) reside.
Include a FIRE tracker widget showing progress and projected retirement date.
Always provide a Family Switcher that toggles context (individual vs. combined family view).
Use Shadcn UI components but heavily customize them to remove the 'default Vercel look'. Use flat solid designs rather than glassmorphism.
